verdict.answer_first: A: sentence 1 gives the mechanism immediately: "signed, self-contained token after login"; B starts with a title and definition section before the tradeoff.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits cleaner: "For a classic single-server web app, a plain server-side session... is often simpler and safer"; B splits into multiple bullets and says "probably what you want."
verdict.fabrication: B has an unverified numeric prescription: "5–15 min"; A uses no precise invented number.
verdict.actionability: B is more operational: "HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite" and "validate exp, iss, aud" give concrete implementation checks.
